reason: Ready for review: union ParseOutput + normalize_parse_output dispatch; all 4 call sites routed; IntakeBatch gap surface added; existing parsers + live-trial seam green

review.reference: Review passed: union ParseOutput + normalize_parse_output dispatch helper; all 4 .parse() call sites (cli, ingest_runner, live_trial_ollama, session-log fixtures) correctly routed — observation->loader, intake->persist_intake_batch, no dead path; 5 production parsers + fixtures untouched and green; IntakeBatch gap surface (unmapped_metrics/skipped_rows) added as non-loadable review metadata; CONTRACT.md reconciled (no replace-vs-supported contradiction); 41 tests pass; ruff+format+mypy clean on owned files; no new network path. Scope: IntakeBatch.validate loop-var rename is a needed mypy fix, ingest_runner envelope schema unchanged (conditional population only). Pre-existing test_bmi_dispatches_through_compute failure confirmed unrelated (engine/freshness path, not in diff).

Ready for review: reference intake parser + synthetic nutrition/supplement fixtures; parse->IntakeBatch->persist_intake_batch e2e green; edge cases (event vs item qty, local_tz day divergence, text-only vs numeric dose, unmapped gap, idempotency) all asserted.

review.reference: Review passed: reference intake parser uses WP01 ParseOutput/IntakeBatch protocol via normalize_parse_output; both synthetic fixtures (MealTrack/SuppStack, made-up values, C-001) carry all required edge cases. Nutrition: event-level (energy+protein on breakfast, energy on snack) and item-level quantities persist distinctly (event_qty=3, item_qty=5, zero dual-attributed), mood_tag surfaced as gap, Auckland late-night snack diverges UTC 03-02 -> local 03-03 (verified). Supplement: numeric IU dose + text-only 'one heaping scoop' persist in distinct slots, reminder_channel surfaced as gap, local_tz present. Gaps go to unmapped_metrics (suggest_metric returns None for both annotation cols) - no silent drop, confirmed in parser _declare_gap + e2e assertion. E2E asserts real warehouse columns (matches profile_intake.py INSERTs), idempotent re-persist (4 inserted then 0, 4 skipped_dup), fact_measurement stays 0 (two-seam rule). 16/16 tests pass; ruff check + format clean; mypy on src surface clean (per-file test import-untyped errors are pre-existing, same on WP01 test). Test file at tests/test_reference_intake_parser.py is outside WP02 owned glob (tests/fixtures/intake/**) but correctly isolated from WP01's test_intake_parser_runtime.py - minor scope nit, not a correctness issue, accepted.

Ready for review: intake resolvers (both domains) + parameterized compute seam (T011-T016, T031)

review.reference: Review passed: both intake resolvers (nutrition daily-points, supplement logged-days) register via _BUILTIN_RESOLVER_MODULES and dispatch through the live registry-driven resolve_dependency with NO per-domain branch (T015 AST test, _resolution.py:181-201). NFR-003 no-fallback proven: T014 seeds a colliding observation row in fact_measurement and asserts intake still refuses 'missing'; resolvers read intake tables only. NFR-006 local-day verified (T016 crosses Auckland midnight, asserts day_basis=local_calendar_day + local day in set; UTC fallback flagged). T031 compute() params seam is keyword-only opt-in default None; sole production caller mcp/server.py:433 + all test callers use 2-arg form unchanged; non-accepting signal raises TypeError. The two out-of-scope test edits (test_bmi_signal.py, test_engine_input_resolution_surface.py) are legitimate spec-mandated reconciliation: FR-001 replaces the old unsupported_domain outcome with real resolvers, so the old assertions were factually wrong; new assertions still lock the no-silent-coercion invariant. ruff/format/mypy green on changed files. 37/38 in scoped run pass; the 1 failure (test_bmi_dispatches_through_compute, stale-weight) is confirmed pre-existing at WP02 (bc69af8) and untouched by T031. NOTE: matcher pinned authoritatively in resolver (matches_supplement + docstring) but not in the resolution contract doc; not a downstream blocker since WP04 consumes the resolver, not the contract prose.
